hero.badge: Customized AI for Small & Medium Enterprises
hero.sub: ArcAI helps SMEs deploy powerful, customized AI assistants — from intelligent chatbots to full workflow automation — without the enterprise price tag.

productsSection.heading: Our Products
productsSection.sub: Purpose-built AI tools that slot into your existing workflows — no AI expertise required.

cta.heading: Ready to build your AI?
cta.sub: Get in touch and we will design a custom AI solution tailored to your business in days, not months.

about.label: About ArcAI
about.intro: ArcAI was founded on the belief that powerful AI should not be exclusive to large enterprises. Small and medium-sized businesses deserve the same capabilities — without the six-figure consulting bill.
about.mission: To make enterprise-grade AI accessible and practical for every SME — with products that are safe, accurate, and genuinely useful from day one.
about.quote: We started ArcAI because we kept seeing great businesses held back by the complexity and cost of modern AI. Our goal is simple: build tools that are powerful enough to matter, and simple enough that you actually use them.

v1.title: Built for real businesses
v1.desc: We design AI tools that work inside the messy, nuanced reality of how SMEs actually operate — not idealized enterprise scenarios.

v2.title: Safety first
v2.desc: Every product ships with guardrails that prevent hallucinations, protect sensitive data, and keep AI behavior predictable and auditable.

v3.title: Radical simplicity
v3.desc: You should not need an AI team to run AI. Our products are designed to be configured in hours and maintained by anyone on your team.

v4.title: Honest partnerships
v4.desc: We work closely with each client to build something that genuinely fits their needs — and we tell you when AI is not the right tool.

contact.label: Get in Touch
contact.sub: Whether you know exactly what you want or are just exploring what AI can do for your business, we would love to talk. Fill out the form and we will respond within 1 business day.

form.messagePlaceholder: Tell us about your business and what you're hoping AI can help with...
form.successSub: Thanks for reaching out. We will get back to you within 1 business day.

arcbot.name: ArcBot
arcbot.shortDescription: A robust, reliable, and accurate AI chatbot built for your business — deployable in minutes.
arcbot.description: ArcBot is ArcAI's flagship conversational AI — available in three editions to match every scale of business need. ArcBot Basic delivers production-grade document intelligence on your company knowledge base: a rigorously evaluated RAG pipeline combining Hybrid Search, Cross-Encoder reranking, and GraphRAG, all wrapped in enterprise-grade safety and security.

features.title: Hybrid Search
features.description: Combines Dense Search (semantic vector embeddings) with Sparse Search (BM25 keyword matching) for best-of-both-worlds retrieval that never misses relevant content.

features.title: Cross-Encoder Reranking
features.description: A Cross-Encoder model (BGE-Reranker or Cohere Rerank) re-evaluates the top 50–100 retrieved chunks, surfacing the most relevant passages before generation.

features.title: GraphRAG
features.description: Knowledge Graph integration maps entity relationships and document structure, enabling accurate multi-hop reasoning that flat vector search cannot achieve.

features.title: Safety & Guardrails
features.description: Multi-layer content moderation, prompt injection detection, PII redaction, and hallucination suppression keep every response trustworthy and on-brand.

features.title: Enterprise Security & Scale
features.description: AES-256 encryption at rest and in transit, strict tenant isolation, SOC-2-aligned audit logging, and horizontal scaling to handle millions of document chunks.

features.title: Benchmarked Accuracy
features.description: Every deployment is evaluated with RAGAS metrics — Answer Correctness, Context Recall, and Faithfulness — so you have measurable evidence it works before going live.

useCases.title: Customer Service
useCases.description: Replace tier-1 support tickets with an AI that resolves 80% of common queries instantly, 24/7.

useCases.title: Internal Help Desk
useCases.description: Let employees query HR policies, IT procedures, and company guidelines without waiting for a response.

useCases.title: Sales Assistant
useCases.description: Qualify leads, answer product questions, and book demo calls — all without human intervention.

arcbot.versionsSub: Three tiers of conversational AI — from production-grade RAG to fully agentic systems — all built on the same battle-tested core.

basic.name: ArcBot Basic
caps: Multi-layer safety guardrails & prompt injection defense

mega.name: ArcBot Mega
mega.tagline: Enterprise document intelligence, fine-tuned to your domain.
caps: Multi-format ingestion: PDF, Word, Excel, HTML, images & more
Domain-specific fine-tuning on your industry vocabulary
Million-document scale with optimized vector stores
State-of-the-art LLM backbone with highest capability tier

agent.name: ArcBot Agent
agent.tagline: Thinks, plans, and acts with tools.
caps: Tool use: web search, API calls, code execution
Full immutable audit trail of every agent action

arcflow.name: ArcFlow
arcflow.tagline: Automate the work. Amplify the team.
arcflow.shortDescription: An AI workflow orchestrator that connects your existing tools and automates multi-step business processes.
arcflow.description: ArcFlow is an intelligent workflow automation platform built for the way SMEs actually operate. It connects your CRM, email, Slack, ERP, and any other tool your team relies on — then orchestrates multi-step automated processes triggered by real business events. Stop doing the same thing twice.

features.title: Workflow Orchestration
features.description: Design branching, conditional workflows with a visual builder. AI fills in the logic gaps you did not anticipate.

features.title: Native Integrations
features.description: Pre-built connectors for Salesforce, HubSpot, Gmail, Slack, Notion, Jira, and 100+ other tools.

features.title: Live Analytics
features.description: Monitor automation performance, catch bottlenecks, and measure time saved in real time.

features.title: Smart Triggers
features.description: Start workflows on schedules, webhooks, email events, form submissions, or AI-detected business signals.

features.title: Role-based Access
features.description: Control who can build, run, or view each workflow with granular permission settings.

features.title: Error Recovery
features.description: Automatic retries, fallback paths, and human-in-the-loop escalation keep workflows running even when things go wrong.

useCases.title: Lead Nurturing
useCases.description: Automatically enrich new leads, assign them to sales reps, and trigger personalized email sequences — all without lifting a finger.

useCases.title: Invoice Processing
useCases.description: Extract data from incoming invoices, match them to purchase orders, and route them for approval automatically.

useCases.title: Employee Onboarding
useCases.description: Trigger account provisioning, welcome emails, and training assignments the moment HR marks a hire as confirmed.
